textByHash.97b0b88866945306fb39769b7ddfe2297a6ed2e1: Hello. What are you doing here?
textByHash.1c48fa4cd191162ff9a01dcc6a0e5584289aff42: Pleased to meet you, Zanik! I know not everyone in Lumbridge was pleased with the peace treaty, but I'm delighted to have new underground neighbours.
textByHash.1ab3d1080a09879a0cf311495be94f8e3bd41a16: The wall collapsed. I had to spend all day clearing it up! The Duke says it was an earthquake.
textByHash.b5ebdb35a5a3909a7a8a9aec7df6d407b9213582: Who, the Duke? He's in his study, on the first floor.
textByHash.685628612c0dc2d5b9006d29e2b1f8a03f47ab9c: You are in Lumbridge Castle, in the Kingdom of Misthalin. Across the river, the road leads north to Varrock, and to the west lies Draynor Village.
textByHash.f70ac12252bce21231c0672c79e26d07e92f0d7e: Ahh, I see all the newcomers arriving in Lumbridge, fresh-faced and eager for adventure. I remember you...
textByHash.1bd492e743c4c66bf9673913d0a203554e6f4a72: You've spent days, hours, minutes in the world since you arrived days ago.
textByHash.78685d707f08b757032adc2922211cb993b0f605: Oh very well done . Taken you a while, but I knew you could do it.
